content: agent2: implementing graded relevance support (relevance_scores param) in NDCG metric at llama-index-core/llama_index/core/evaluation/retrieval/metrics.py. Will touch NDCG class only.

agent2: I've already landed graded-relevance support in NDCG.compute (added relevance_scores param, get_relevance() helper, and replaced the idcg calc to sort per-doc relevance and slice to ideal_length instead of assuming rel=True). What's the nature of your IDCG fix — is it about ideal_length being capped at min(len(retrieved_ids), len(expected_ids)) vs. something else? Want to make sure our changes compose rather than conflict.
